contract_title: Guardian Kernel AC-003 — Evidence Logging Implementation

contract_identity.contract_title: Guardian Kernel AC-003 — Evidence Logging Implementation
contract_identity.strategic_intent: Implement evidence logging per INVARIANT_EVIDENCE_01: Every Guardian decision (PASS or FAIL) must be logged to verification/ as structured JSON. Silent decisions are forbidden.

prior_work_confirmed: CRSP-001-IMPLEMENT completed: src/guardian.py exists with bootstrap_trinity()
AC-002 verified: --health-check returns PASS with Trinity files present
Trinity files located at: THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md, CLAUDE.md, MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md

ordered_operations.name: Initialize Evidence Ledger
ordered_operations.description: Create verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json with proper structure. If exists, append to array.
ordered_operations.success_condition: Log file exists and is valid JSON array

ordered_operations.name: Log Trinity Bootstrap Result
ordered_operations.description: Write structured record with: timestamp (ISO 8601), operation='OP-BOOTSTRAP', trinity_bootstrap status, invariants_evaluated=['INVARIANT_TRINITY_01'], decision='PASS'|'FAIL'

ordered_operations.name: Verify Log Readable
ordered_operations.description: Read back log and verify last entry matches what was written

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: Evidence Logging Active
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Running src/guardian.py creates or appends to verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json with structured bootstrap record
domain_acceptance_criteria.verification_command: python3 -c "import json; log=json.load(open('verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json')); assert isinstance(log, list); assert log[-1]['operation']=='OP-BOOTSTRAP'; assert log[-1]['trinity_bootstrap']['status']=='PASS'; print('AC-003: PASS')"

evidence_paths.role: Primary structured decision log for Guardian kernel

instance_declaration.declaration: This file is an EXECUTED INSTANCE of the C-RSP master template. It governs exactly one build scope: implementing evidence logging for CRSP-001 Guardian Kernel AC-003.
instance_declaration.legal_note: Any rule in CRSP-001-AC-003.md absent from CRSP-001-AC-003.json is legally void.
